prompt: Task 68 tests detected Assertion Roulette smell by JNose.
Refactor tests to fix Assertion Roulette smell by splitting multi-assertion tests into single-assertion tests.
Use private static final constants for all inputs and expected values.
Add descriptive failure messages to all assertEquals and assertTrue calls.
response: Split all multi-assertion test methods into individual single-assertion test methods.
All list inputs and expected values extracted into private static final constants.
Each assertion includes a descriptive failure message to eliminate Assertion Roulette smell.
interactions.notes: Assertion Roulette smell resolved by ensuring each test method contains exactly one assertion with a descriptive message. No smells detected after improvement.
